theme: caterers plating banquet courses from shared kitchens
title: Banquet Line Antiaffinity: Replica Kitchens for Shared Prep Stations
strategies: naive baseline: frequency-balanced block placement (dish d -> kitchens [(d%G)*R,(d%G)*R+R)) plus always-serve-from-replica-#0 routing (ratio ~0.1)
obvious greedy: same frequency-balanced block placement, but adaptive per-course routing to the least-loaded available replica (beats the baseline, still collides on signature menus)

strong: co-occurrence-aware antiaffinity placement -- read the course trace, place each dish's replicas on the kitchens least claimed by dishes it is co-plated with (weighted by crowding exposure), then use the same per-course greedy routing
open: joint placement+routing optimization via LP relaxation / min-cost flow per course, or iterative local-search re-placement using realized routing regret (headroom above strong)
